kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09B. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09B" and put them into a temporary table called J09B_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09B_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09B_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09B" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY1 LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR CITY2 LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR CITY1 LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR CITY2 LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1 TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_CONTACT TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_CONTACT TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT nm.TITLE FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT nm.FORENAME FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT nm.SURNAME FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT nm.STREET FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT nm.STREETNO FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1 = (SELECT nm.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1_CONTACT = (SELECT nm.CITY1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2_CONTACT = (SELECT nm.CITY2 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), EMAIL = (SELECT nm.EMAIL FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1); UPDATE J09B_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.TITLE FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE TITLE END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.FORENAME FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE FORENAME END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.SURNAME FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE SURNAME END, STREET = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.STREET FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE STREET END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.STREETNO FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE STREETNO END, POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE POST_CODE1 END, CITY1_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.CITY1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE CITY1_CONTACT END, CITY2_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.CITY2 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE CITY2_CONTACT END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.EMAIL FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE EMAIL END; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM EABL WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND strftime('%Y', [Record created on]) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y', [Record created on])) = 2); UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM EABL WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND strftime('%Y', [Record created on]) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y', [Record created on])) = 2) AND ENTSCHEIDUNG != 'MANDATORY_READING';

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp
CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY1 LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR CITY2 LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR CITY1 LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR CITY2 LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1_CONTACT TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_CONTACT TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_CONTACT TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09B_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT nm.TITLE FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT nm.FORENAME FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT nm.SURNAME FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT nm.STREET FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT nm.STREETNO FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1_CONTACT = (SELECT nm.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1_CONTACT = (SELECT nm.CITY1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2_CONTACT = (SELECT nm.CITY2 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), EMAIL = (SELECT nm.EMAIL FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09B_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.TITLE FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE TITLE END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.FORENAME FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE FORENAME END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.SURNAME FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE SURNAME END, STREET = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.STREET FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE STREET END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.STREETNO FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE STREETNO END, POST_CODE1_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE POST_CODE1_CONTACT END, CITY1_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.CITY1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE CITY1_CONTACT END, CITY2_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.CITY2 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE CITY2_CONTACT END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT sm.EMAIL FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE EMAIL END

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND strftime('%Y', [Record created on]) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y', [Record created on])) = 2)

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND strftime('%Y', [Record created on]) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y', [Record created on])) = 2) AND ENTSCHEIDUNG != 'MANDATORY_READING'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mandatory_cnt FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG='MANDATORY_READING'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS direct_cnt FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG='DIRECT_MAIL'

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] AS [Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.], j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, j.TITLE, j.FORENAME, j.SURNAME, j.STREET, j.STREETNO, j.POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, j.CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, j.CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, j.EMAIL FROM J09B_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = j.ANLAGE WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG='MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] AS [Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.], j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, j.TITLE, j.FORENAME, j.SURNAME, j.STREET, j.STREETNO, j.POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, j.CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, j.CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, j.EMAIL FROM J09B_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = j.ANLAGE WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG='DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] AS [Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.], j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, j.TITLE, j.FORENAME, j.SURNAME, j.STREET, j.STREETNO, j.POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, j.CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, j.CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, j.EMAIL FROM J09B_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = j.ANLAGE WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading export.
Please find attached the J09B meter readings export excluding mandatory reading and direct mail cases.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE J09B_temp
